data.content: Plan: update stale grooming settings and dispatch schema with a staleGrooming action plus stale_grooming pool; replace selected-agent-only resolution with dispatch-backed default resolution and explicit configured-agent override; add first-class list/options/reviews/status API routes; add OpenAPI/docs coverage; test sorting, default resolution, override, oldest-N enqueue, and status. Risk is avoiding silent agent fallback, so the resolver will fail loudly with FOOLERY GROOMING FAILURE when the default target is not configured.
